title: CLEAN AND SOBER HOUSING - 211info
text: IRON TRIBE NETWORK CLEAN AND SOBER HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sober living for people in recovery. 11763 SE 82nd Drive Suite A Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with minor children Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 344-6710 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 344-6710 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, Social Security card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Marion, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On Trimet bus route 79 Services: Sober Living Homes Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
